citation: Levin L, Samorodnitzky GR, Schwartz-Arad D, Geiger SB. (2007). Dental and oral trauma during childhood and adolescence in Israel: occurrence, causes, and outcomes. Dental Traumatology.
rate_denominator_raw: (%) of 427 young adults with dental injury
extraction_notes: 427 young adults aged 18-21, lifetime recall. 31.1% had oral/dental injuries (133 total); 72 (16.9%) dental. Causes of dental injuries: falls 64%, sport 23.2%, fights 7.2%, MVA 5.6%. Laceration 47.3% / fracture 41.9%. MG aware 22.6%; MG used 2.8%.
